title: MDCAT 90-Day Admissions Timeline

milestones.task: Complete diagnostic, identify weak science chapters, begin daily Biology/Chemistry revision.
Move into topic-wise MCQs, formula revision and weekly mini-mocks.
Use full mixed practice, revise error log and focus on repeated weak areas.
Attempt timed mocks, avoid new heavy topics and revise high-yield notes.

parentNote: Parents should track routine and mock trend, not only one daily score.

title: FAST / NUST NET 45-Day Timeline

milestones.task: Revise math foundations, percentages, ratios, algebra and physics formulas.
Practise quantitative and IQ sections with timed drills.
Take alternate-day mocks and repair mistakes from the results report.
Revise formula bank, flashcards and the most repeated error-log entries.

parentNote: If speed is low, prioritise short timed sets instead of long passive revision.

title: NAT / GAT 30-Day Timeline

milestones.task: Take diagnostic, revise vocabulary, grammar and basic quantitative rules.
Focus on analytical arrangements, assumptions and reading comprehension.
Attempt mixed question sets and record all repeated mistakes.
Take timed mocks, revise flashcards and review weak-topic summary.

parentNote: Short-range preparation needs consistency every day; missing two days can disturb the whole plan.

title: IELTS / SAT 28-Day Skill Timeline

milestones.task: Diagnostic reading/writing check, vocabulary in context and grammar repair.
Practise reading purpose, inference, tone and sentence logic.
Add timed writing or verbal practice and review model strategies.
Use mock review, flashcards and error log for final correction.

parentNote: Language tests improve through feedback cycles; reading only notes is not enough.
